result.stdout:
Redline Health Check CLI - Available Commands:

  run
    --seed <uint>             Random seed (required)
    --route <string>          Route/Dungeon ID (required)
    --party <string>          Party ID (required)
    [--format text|json]      Output format (default: text)
    [--iterations <int>]      Iterations for determinism (default: 1)
    [--key-file <path>]       Optional signing key file

  sweep
    --route <string>          Route/Dungeon ID (required)
    --party <string>          Party ID (required)
    [--iterations <int>]      Number of sweep runs (default: 100)
    [--start-seed <uint>]     Starting seed (default: 1)
    [--par-time <int>]        Par time threshold in ms (optional)
    [--key-file <path>]       Optional signing key file

  check-golden
    --seed <uint>             Random seed (required)
    --route <string>          Route/Dungeon ID (required)
    --party <string>          Party ID (required)
    [--golden-dir <path>]     Golden files directory (default: Golden)
    [--format text|json]      Output format (default: text)
    [--key-file <path>]       Optional signing key file

  check-determinism
    --seed <uint>             Random seed (required)
    --route <string>          Route/Dungeon ID (required)
    --party <string>          Party ID (required)
    [--iterations <int>]      Number of runs (default: 5, min: 2)
    [--tolerance-ms <int>]    Runtime variance tolerance (default: 0)
    [--format text|json]      Output format (default: text)
    [--key-file <path>]       Optional signing key file

  check-all
    [--golden-dir <path>]     Golden files directory (default: Golden)
    [--format text|json]      Output format (default: text)

  leaderboard submit
    --route <string>          Route/Dungeon ID (required)
    --party <string>          Party ID (required)
    [--seed <uint>]           Seed (default: 123)
    [--api <url>]             Leaderboard API base (default: http://localhost:5000)

  leaderboard query
    --route <string>          Route/Dungeon ID (required)
    --party <string>          Party ID (required)
    [--limit <int>]           Max entries (default: 5)
    [--page <int>]            Page (default: 0)
    [--api <url>]             Leaderboard API base (default: http://localhost:5000)

  help
    Display this help message

  --version, -v
    Show CLI version

Redline Health Check CLI - Available Commands:

  run

  check-determinism
    --seed <uint>             Random seed (required)

    [--iterations <int>]      Number of runs (default: 5, min: 2)

  leaderboard submit

    [--api <url>]             Leaderboard API base (default: http://localhost:5000)
